text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of the Tenno Sho (Spring).
Gold City's manager is also here to see how well
she does.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: You look different today... refreshed, even.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: I wonder how your trainer managed that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Don't be rude.
choice_data_list: City and I just talked, that's all.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Is that so?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Remember, it's not just results we're looking for. If
your running today isn't truly captivating...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Then you'll keep your promise and stop racing.
Are we all in agreement?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Just one question, though.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Do you want to witness my captivating running today? Or are you hoping to see me humiliate myself again?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: To be honest... I don't know.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: But there's one thing I can say for sure.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
The Gold City I know shouldn't be stumbling over
something like this.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
The Gold City I know would be shining under the
spotlight as the whole world applauds her.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for bothering you right before the race.
Good luck.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I don't belong to my manager. I don't belong to
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm done with all the expectations, the praise. I
didn't ask for any of it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: After all, I chose this path...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Is she ignoring me? Well, it is what it is.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
From her point of view, I'm just a boring nobody
who stopped caring.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Maybe she's right... but I still want to run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep on running, today, tomorrow, the
day after that...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So I can't lose! Not to you, not to anyone!
